sigWerErrors.reason: Difference is only punctuation (comma), which should be ignored according to the guidance.
The insertion of 'bir' (meaning 'a' or 'one') does not significantly change the meaning of the sentence in this context.
'Yalnız' (alone/only) and 'yanlış' (wrong) are completely different words and change the meaning of the sentence.
